falling or staying asleep: Freq CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how often the resident, over the past two weeks, has had trouble falling or staying asleep, or sleeping too much. 0=Never or 1 day
1=2-6 days (several days)
2=7-11 days (half or more of the days)
3=12-14 days (nearly every day) effective 10/01/2023
